{{Quote|From here it looks as though the whole galaxy is waiting, holding its breath for just the right moment.|Saduu Nagag|<ref name="Riders of the Maelstrom">[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']]</ref>}}
'''Saduu Nagag''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Aplocaph]] tourist aboard the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']] when it was [[Attack on the Kuari Princess|attacked]] by the [[Riders of the Maelstrom]]. He was a very fastidious being, who, in hopes of attracting romance, would make an effort to gleam his skin on an almost hourly basis.

==Appearances==
*[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] {{Reprint|Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)}} {{1st}}
